project.title: AI Removes Waiting, Not Judgment
project.style_notes: premium vertical explainer, charcoal and soft gold palette, controlled motion, clean silhouettes, overlay-ready compositions, no readable generated UI text
project.format_guidance: Compose for premium 9:16 vertical framing. Keep the main subject centered, protect a raised lower subtitle-safe band, and leave clean negative space in proof beats for later overlays when needed.
project.narration_style: calm, intelligent, understated English explainer with slight tension in the first line
project.narration_notes: Every line must be understood on first listen. One idea per line. Avoid sales language, trailer energy, and jargon-heavy delivery.
project.consistency_notes: Keep the engineer's wardrobe, silhouette, and workspace stable across shots. Avoid readable text, logos, close hand detail, and visible lip-sync.
constraints: no readable on-screen text inside generated visuals
no close-up typing or finger detail
preserve the raised lower subtitle-safe band
project.audio_notes: restrained low synth bed, subtle room tone, soft impacts, and airy transitions under external narration only

characters.name: Lead Engineer
characters.description: a generic senior engineer in dark minimal clothing, clear silhouette, calm posture, and no recognizable real-person likeness
continuity_rules: keep the same dark wardrobe across all shots
preserve a calm posture and controlled movement
avoid celebrity likeness and visible brand styling

shots.title: The old pressure changes shape
shots.subject: the lead engineer alone in a dim workspace
shots.action: looks at a wall of unfinished structure as the cluttered room starts simplifying around them
shots.setting: dark studio workspace with abstract boards, modular panels, and premium atmospheric depth
shots.lighting: controlled charcoal shadows with soft gold rim light
shots.camera_motion: slow push-in with a gentle drift to center the subject
shots.start_frame: one engineer sits in a premium but cluttered studio, facing too many unfinished decisions
shots.end_frame: the room feels simpler and more ordered while the engineer stays calm
shots.narration_cue: land engineering as the room finishes simplifying
must_keep: no readable text anywhere in frame

shots.title: The blank page disappears first
shots.subject: over-shoulder view of the engineer at a desk with a monitor and notebook
shots.action: the monitor glows from empty shapes to organized blocks while the engineer stays mostly still
shots.setting: minimal workstation with a clean monitor silhouette, desk lamp, and controlled negative space
shots.lighting: soft monitor glow with low-contrast room ambience
shots.start_frame: a calm over-shoulder workstation plate with a mostly empty monitor silhouette
shots.end_frame: the monitor remains unreadable but visually organized, ready for a real overlay in post
shots.narration_line: It removes the blank page first.
shots.narration_cue: land blank page as the screen shifts from empty to structured
must_keep: no readable code or UI text
shots.post_notes: Replace the monitor area with a real screen capture in the final edit if exact proof is needed.

shots.title: Busywork stops hiding the real problem
shots.subject: repetitive task fragments surrounding the engineer
shots.action: small repetitive task cards and tangled cables peel away, revealing one clean system path
shots.setting: stylized abstract workspace with layered panels and floating task fragments
shots.lighting: charcoal base with brighter gold accents where the path clears
shots.camera_motion: slow orbital move that ends on the cleared path
shots.start_frame: the engineer is partially obscured by repetitive fragments and visual noise
shots.end_frame: one clear path remains and the engineer is fully visible again
shots.narration_cue: land busywork as the clutter peels away

shots.title: Better engineers test more before the day ends
shots.subject: a clean side-angle workstation with layered panels and a standing engineer silhouette
shots.action: abstract panels reorganize into a confident review layout while the engineer observes rather than types
shots.setting: premium studio workspace with one large clean panel and smaller soft-focus support screens
shots.lighting: soft white panel light and subtle gold accents
shots.camera_motion: subtle side slide with no abrupt movement
shots.start_frame: one large clean panel dominates the frame with the engineer in profile
shots.end_frame: the composition remains simple and overlay-ready for a real diff, test result, or deploy proof
shots.narration_line: Good engineers test more ideas, faster.
shots.narration_cue: land test more ideas as the main panel settles into place
must_keep: large clean panel reserved for post proof
shots.post_notes: Use this as a clean plate for a real test, diff, or deploy overlay when exact proof matters.

shots.title: The human decision stays central
shots.subject: the lead engineer reviewing a simplified architectural board
shots.action: studies one elegant system diagram and makes one deliberate physical adjustment
shots.setting: clean design wall with luminous geometry and no labels
shots.lighting: soft gold highlight on the board and low ambient charcoal fill
shots.camera_motion: slow push with a very slight rise
shots.start_frame: the engineer stands before one clean architecture board
shots.end_frame: a single deliberate adjustment resolves the composition
shots.narration_cue: land decides what ships on the final adjustment

shots.title: The best engineers look bigger, not louder
shots.subject: the engineer stepping into a larger, calmer system space
shots.action: moves forward as the environment opens into a bright layered structure with elegant depth
shots.setting: futuristic but restrained systems hall with clean modular architecture
shots.lighting: bright soft gold horizon against darker foreground depth
shots.camera_motion: smooth forward chase that ends in a composed hero frame
shots.start_frame: the engineer begins moving through a narrow dark passage
shots.end_frame: the engineer stands inside a larger, calmer structure, clearly ahead of the old workflow
shots.narration_line: That is why the best engineers feel bigger, not louder.
shots.narration_cue: land bigger, not louder on the clean final hero frame
